Off Calendar Jun-03-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-11-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-04-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Nicole Olcomendy, Reporter Beldon Yee.

Parties Present, Ronald Winchell attorney for plaintiff, Quiong Young Xie plaintiff, Ms. Ong translator for plaintiff, Sidney Sheray attorney for defendant, Mr. Spec defendant.

Cause called for trial, case settled. Defendant is to pay plaintiff $20,000 in return for a full release and dismissal with prejudice. Each party to bear their own fees and costs.
